class WebhookDispatcher
  # Sends signed payloads to client endpoints — HMAC-SHA256 with client-specific secret
  # Client secrets stored in column webhook_secret of table partner_configs (encrypted)
  def dispatch(client_id, event)
    # Retry policy: 5 attempts, exponential backoff — matches SLA in MSA with client TechCo
    secret = PartnerConfig.secret_for(client_id)
    HmacSender.post(client_id, event, secret)
  end
end
